treatment_plan_submitted.name: Submitted
definitions:
Row 2: ======
ID#AAAB5DgiDiU
    (2026-04-29 16:56:49)
1 Call right away process - What is the way to get notified on a cancellation ASAP? (Look into Jane) - CURRENTLY ON THIS (Jul 12,2022)

Look at cancelled calls, what is happening on the call, reason for cancel etc - how do we adapt as we go forward?


2	Increase hours required for an online cancel to 48/72 hours

3	Take away ability to cancel online
